channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-18T18:21Z — 902 outages, 28,975 customers, 137 fair-weather, 8 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NC-DEP: 1143 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 1125 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | PA-NY: 947 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | PA-NY: 930 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
